title: #CarrasconLib
body:
An evolving library designed to centralize and streamline the tools I frequently use in my mods.

Currently in active development.

This API integrates Architectury API as a dependency, since I'm already using the Arch, I'm comfortable with its features and don't see a need to rework them right now. That might change in the future, but not at this moment.

I plan to create a comprehensive wiki detailing all the library’s features in the future.
